question_en: What is Radiology? Is it a good job for someone who didn't clear NEET?
question_hi_hinglish: Radiology kya hai? Kya ye unke liye acchi job hai jinka NEET clear nahi hua?
answer_en: Radiology technicians operate MRI, CT scans, and X-ray machines. In 2026, with many new diagnostic centers in Raipur and Durg, these specialists are in high demand. It’s a 2-3 year degree/diploma and offers a stable hospital job without the long study hours of a doctor.
answer_hi_hinglish: Radiology technicians MRI aur CT scan jaisi machines chalate hain. 2026 mein Raipur aur Durg mein naye diagnostic centers khulne se inki bahut demand hai. Ye 2-3 saal ka course hai aur isme doctor jitni lambi padhai kiye bina hospital mein stable naukri mil jati hai.

question_en: My child wants to be an Optometrist. Is it just about selling spectacles?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha Optometrist banna chahta hai. Kya isme sirf chashma bechna hota hai?
answer_en: No, Optometrists are eye-health professionals. They diagnose vision problems and prescribe lenses. With the massive growth of optical chains like Lenskart and eye hospitals across Chhattisgarh, an Optometrist can earn well and even open their own clinic. It's a very clean and professional field.
answer_hi_hinglish: Nahi, Optometrist aankhon ke health specialist hote hain. Wo vision check karte hain aur aankhon ki bimariyan pehchante hain. Chhattisgarh mein eye hospitals aur Lenskart jaise bade brands ki wajah se isme bahut growth hai. Baccha khud ka clinic bhi khol sakta hai.

question_en: What is 'Occupational Therapy'? Is there a demand for it in smaller cities?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Occupational Therapy' kya hai? Kya chhote shehron mein iski demand hai?
answer_en: Occupational Therapists help people with physical or mental challenges perform daily tasks. In 2026, there is a huge demand for them in child development centers and rehabilitation clinics. It's a very noble and high-paying profession for students who have a lot of patience and empathy.
answer_hi_hinglish: Occupational Therapists un logon ki madad karte hain jinhe rozana ke kaam karne mein takleef hoti hai (jaise special bacche). 2026 mein inki demand clinics aur schools mein bahut badh gayi hai. Agar bacche mein sabr aur logon ki madad karne ka jazba hai, toh ye best career hai.

question_en: What is Cybersecurity? Can my child get a job in a bank with this?
question_hi_hinglish: Cybersecurity kya hai? Kya isse bank mein naukri mil sakti hai?
answer_en: Cybersecurity experts protect companies from hackers. Every bank and digital company in 2026 needs them. It is a 'micro-niche' because it's more specialized than general IT. A specialist in this field often earns double the salary of a regular software engineer.
answer_hi_hinglish: Cybersecurity experts companies ko hackers se bachate hain. 2026 mein har bank aur digital company ko inki zaroorat hai. Ye normal IT se zyada 'specialized' kaam hai, isliye isme salary ek normal engineer se dugni (double) tak ho sakti hai.

question_en: Everyone says 'Data is the new oil.' What job does a Data Scientist actually do?
question_hi_hinglish: Sab kehte hain 'Data is the new oil.' Data Scientist asliyat mein kya kaam karta hai?
answer_en: Data Scientists look at thousands of numbers to help businesses make decisions (like what people will buy next). In 2026, even local retail chains in Chhattisgarh use data. If your child is good at math and logic, this is the most powerful career in the modern world.
answer_hi_hinglish: Data Scientist dher saare numbers ko analyze karke business ko sahi faisle lene mein madad karta hai. 2026 mein Chhattisgarh ke bade malls aur businesses bhi data use kar rahe hain. Agar bacche ka math aur dimaag tez hai, toh ye aaj ke zamane ka sabse taqatwar career hai.

question_en: My son wants to learn 'Cloud Computing.' Does he have to move to Bangalore for this?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta 'Cloud Computing' seekhna chahta hai. Kya use iske liye Bangalore jana padega?
answer_en: Cloud Computing is the technology that keeps apps like WhatsApp and YouTube running. While big companies are in Bangalore, 'Cloud' jobs are often 100% remote. Your son can work for a US-based company while sitting in Bhilai, earning a high 'metro' salary.
answer_hi_hinglish: Cloud Computing wo technology hai jisse WhatsApp aur YouTube jaise apps chalte hain. Isme sabse bada fayda ye hai ki isme 'Work from Home' bahut milta hai. Baccha Bhilai mein baithkar kisi badi US company ke liye kaam kar sakta hai aur sheher jaisi salary kama sakta hai.

question_en: Is 'UI/UX Design' a computer job or an art job?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya 'UI/UX Design' computer ki job hai ya art ki?
answer_en: It's both! UI/UX designers decide how an app looks and how easy it is to use. It’s perfect for creative students who are also tech-savvy. In 2026, as every business launches its own app, these designers are the most sought-after professionals in the creative industry.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ye dono ka mix hai! UI/UX designers tay karte hain ki mobile app dikhne mein kaisi hogi aur use chalana kitna asaan hoga. Jo bacche creative hain aur mobile/computer pasand karte hain, unke liye ye 2026 ki sabse trending job hai.

question_en: What is a Dialysis Technician? Is it a secure career?
question_hi_hinglish: Dialysis Technician kya hota hai? Kya isme career secure hai?
answer_en: Dialysis Technicians operate the machines that clean the blood of patients with kidney issues. With the rise in lifestyle diseases, every city hospital now has a dialysis unit. It is a very secure, technical, and essential healthcare role that offers lifelong employment stability.
answer_hi_hinglish: Dialysis Technician un machines ko chalate hain jo kidney ke patients ka khoon saaf karti hain. Aaj kal har sheher ke hospital mein dialysis unit hota hai. Ye ek bahut hi secure aur zaroori kaam hai, jisme naukri ki chinta kabhi nahi hoti.
